dialog.title: Build pack
dialog.description: Builds the project as an installable clothing resource for the selected target.

fivem.label: FiveM
fivem.description: Streamable server resource with real YMT files (recommended).

singleplayer.label: Singleplayer
singleplayer.description: dlc.rpf for GTA V singleplayer (requires a dlclist.xml entry).

ragemp.label: RageMP
ragemp.description: dlc.rpf in client format for RageMP servers (experimental).

altv.label: alt:V
altv.description: Folder structure as a DLC resource for alt:V (experimental).

setup.dlcInvalid: Lowercase letters, digits and underscores only (a–z, 0–9, _).
setup.resourceInvalid: Allowed characters are letters, digits, _ and -.
setup.outDirTitle: Choose the output folder for the build
setup.shopMetaHint: Makes the drawables discoverable for shop/clothing scripts.

findings.noIssues: No issues found — ready to build.
findings.errorsBlock_one: {{count}} error blocks the build — please fix it and re-check.
findings.errorsBlock_other: {{count}} errors block the build — please fix them and re-check.

texture.title: Optimize texture
texture.description: {{name}} ({{size}}) will be shrunk directly in the project file.
texture.permanentWarning: Permanent change (cannot be reverted via undo) — the original is backed up under „.atelier-cache/texture-backups“ in the project folder.
texture.rgbaSizeHint: Lossless, but a noticeably larger file (no compression).

bulk.title: Optimize oversized textures
bulk.description: Finds textures larger than {{threshold}} px edge length and shrinks them directly in the project (format is preserved).
bulk.permanentWarning: Permanent change (cannot be reverted via undo) — originals are backed up under „.atelier-cache/texture-backups“ in the project folder.
bulk.skipped_one: {{count}} file could not be analyzed and will be skipped.
bulk.skipped_other: {{count}} files could not be analyzed and will be skipped.

toast.someFailed: Some textures could not be optimized
